form.formComment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 4 length sixth (17.16) over 300m at this track. The form from her last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 4 length sixth (17.16) over 300m at this track. The form from her last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.14) at this track in a Grade 5 H, finishing seventh and beaten 7 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and four places from 10 starts. Looks a key chance on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (17.14) at this track in a Grade 5 H, finishing seventh and beaten 7 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and four places from 10 starts. Looks a key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 4 length fourth (16.93) over 300m at this track. Is a danger.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 4 length fourth (16.93) over 300m at this track. Is a danger.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a slick early split last time and went on to clock 16.94 as a strongly fancied winner over 300m at this track. The form from the last run stacks up well. Worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a slick early split last time and went on to clock 16.94 as a strongly fancied winner over 300m at this track. The form from the last run stacks up well. Worth including.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and slow to begin.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 12 over 300m at this track in a Grade 5 H. Safely held last time and looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 12 over 300m at this track in a Grade 5 H. Safely held last time and looking to others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide on home turn.

form.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (17.05) over 300m at this track. Has a wide draw to navigate and looks safely held.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage sixth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (17.05) over 300m at this track. Has a wide draw to navigate and looks safely held.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth in a Grade 5 H on April 12 over 300m at this track behind Santana Boy, beaten 5 lengths (17.02). Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished sixth in a Grade 5 H on April 12 over 300m at this track behind Santana Boy, beaten 5 lengths (17.02). Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (16.91) when second at this track in a Grade 5 H. Has two successes and five minors from 10 starts from box 8. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (16.91) when second at this track in a Grade 5 H. Has two successes and five minors from 10 starts from box 8. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Has finished last in his last couple of starts, most recently at Warragul over 400m. Needs to find a bit more to test these.
